texto: A recurring theme in the book is instinct versus articulation. Although teen services people may know and understand issues on an instinctive level, they must be prepared to articulate these ideas in the face of threats to teen services.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jennifer Velásquez sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “A recurring theme in the book is instinct versus articulation.
